name: Fpe the smile parasite Au
description:
This au won the voting so… here it is, of course this isn’t finish because the creator only posted like 4 videos about the au and make sure to watch episode 2.5 of the au if you haven’t watched it but that’s all guys peace out.🫡

THIS IS ONLY MY OPINION SO AND YES EVERYONE IS 18+ OR OLDER

(A quick note yes it isn’t a virus outbreak nor a disease but a parasite entity but I recommend to watch every episode of “fpe the smile parasite au” to get a better understanding of the lore behind this outbreak peace my brothers 🫡)

Survivors: Miss Grace, Miss Sasha, Zip, Oliver, Mister Demi, Claire, Lana, Bubble, and Oliver

Infected: Mister Compass (Tank), Miss Bloomie (Slasher), Miss Thavel (Puppeteer), Riley (Stalker), Skell (Night Runner), Kevin (Runner), Cubbie (Runner), Miss Emily (Screamer), Edward (Crawler), Sophie (Runner), Abbie (Blind), Erick OC (coureur de lames/blade runner), Engel (Runner), ΔLICE has been discontinued and the reason why is unknown but until further notice enjoy:)

Dead: Lizzy, Petunia, Ruby, Miss Circle, and Robby
creator: Lordan3758
